scope: single-seed bounded qualification of a current-state-sufficient exchangeable histogram residual

mechanism.name: exchangeable current-histogram residual posterior
mechanism.sufficient_statistic: exact normalized histogram of the current categorical state, computed by one vectorized bincount
mechanism.base_measure: a_t h(A_t) + (1-a_t) Uniform(118), with a_t=cos^2(pi t_A/2)
mechanism.clean_boundary: composition counts equal the current-state histogram exactly at t_A=0
mechanism.site_feedback: expected species embedding under the residual-corrected posterior
mechanism.integer_decoder: largest-remainder model-predicted counts and exact Hungarian assignment
forbidden: target formula or target counts as input
sampler search or per-step target projection
L1, M1, joint or tensor training

decision_rule.pass: qualify p(A|F_0,L_0,N) and permit only a separately frozen L1 lattice-head qualification
decision_rule.fail: stop before L1; do not add another element feature head, more exposure, or sampler changes, and reassess whether composition must be an explicit stochastic state
decision_rule.boundary: E1.3 cannot change historical H1a, qualify free joint generation, or authorize M1/J2, H1b-H6, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
